notes: Fills deck slot 0 (counter, global, defaultTitle "Puzzles Solved"). Shape signed off by Pierre 2026-07-08: derived counter, not manual.

Single derived entry layton-mm:puzzles-solved:route — derivedFrom lists the 82 "Solve NNN" spine steps in route order; target omitted, so it defaults to derivedFrom.length = 82. Read-only in the tracker: it counts checked route steps.

The 82-step set matches the extract-data puzzles dataset 1:1 (82 records, no gaps either way; no multi-puzzle steps; none flagged). The set is the Any% route's solved puzzles, not the game's full puzzle list — hence the "(route)" label.
